scope_exclusion_rationale: Prompt-inspector scope is exclusively agents/*.md and commands/*.md files. All 19 changed files are shell scripts (.sh), Python scripts (.py), and a JSONL data file (.jsonl). None are command or agent prompt markdown files. Therefore no introduced_in_diff:true prompt verbosity violation exists for this diff.

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex (gpt-5.5, xhigh) confirmed the zero-findings verdict. PROPOSED_FIX applied: replaced with scope-precise language (files_in_verbosity_scope:0) and clarified that no introduced_in_diff:true prompt verbosity violation exists for this diff.
